publishedAbstract: - The `image-registry` pod does not come up when RHOCS Noobaa S3 storage is used.- The `cluster-image-registry-operator` pod complains about the `x509: certificate signed by unknown authority` error. ~~~ # oc logs cluster-image-registry-operator-xxxxxxxxxx-n openshift-image-registry 2022-10-19T21:40:45.955166438Z caused by: Head "https://s3-openshift-storage.apps.example.com/obc-s3-c1720753-59f9-495d-84f4-4df5f1bf60e2": x509: certificate signed by unknown authority, requeuing ~~~
publishedTitle: Pods not coming up when RHOCS Noobaa S3 storage used with image registry in RHOCP 4
